title: Position against named competitors
description: Deep-dive the competitor set named in the spec gap section and write a dated positioning note stating the delta claim sentence-by-sentence.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the note is written THEN every competitor named in the spec has a one-line differentiation and the delta claim survives; WHEN a competitor already covers the delta THEN the idea is flagged for kill or re-scoping before any build; ref: future_work/ideas/04-mllm-evidence-auditor/spec.md:1
review_initial_requirements: Check the competitor list is refreshed against arXiv within 30 days of starting.
review_regression_requirements: Verify the delta claim does not overlap the AAAI-27 paper claims or another idea in this portfolio.

title: Prepare data and assets
description: Freeze the audit checklist and run a local Qwen-VL-class MLLM over one full catalog; build weak behavioral verification proxies from train split. Reuse the raw-data-first builders, frozen-bank pipeline, U_ds estimator, and pre-registration discipline from the main project.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN assets are built THEN artifacts carry bank and split hashes and frozen parameters; WHEN any statistic threshold is needed THEN it is pre-registered before values are computed per the spec-8.4-style discipline; ref: future_work/ideas/04-mllm-evidence-auditor/spec.md:1
review_initial_requirements: Check no validation or test information enters any train-only statistic.
review_regression_requirements: Verify asset provenance is documented well enough for an external reproduction.

title: Run the decisive kill-test experiment
description: The spec Gate-0 equivalent. Run it before any full build; a failed kill test closes the idea cheaply.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the kill test runs THEN its criterion is evaluated exactly as written in the spec: Incremental value: audited score q must show significant partial correlation with per-item tilt harm and cold-start proxy beyond cheap coverage/length proxies; if cheap proxies suffice the idea dies; WHEN it fails THEN the row records the kill decision and downstream rows are closed as no-run; ref: future_work/ideas/04-mllm-evidence-auditor/spec.md:1
review_initial_requirements: Check the kill criterion was not softened after seeing data.
review_regression_requirements: Verify pass or fail is reported with effect sizes and seed noise, not adjectives.

title: Run full evaluation matrix and assemble paper evidence
description: Isotonic calibration study, distillation fidelity (rank rho >= 0.85), plug-in evaluation inside the gate framework.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the matrix completes THEN every table planned in the spec has a dated artifact; WHEN the paper draft claims anything THEN it cites those artifacts and respects the forbidden-claim discipline inherited from the main project; ref: future_work/ideas/04-mllm-evidence-auditor/spec.md:1
review_initial_requirements: Check controls and shuffles are included, not just headline arms.
review_regression_requirements: Verify negative or boundary results are reported honestly rather than dropped.

title: Review documented vision against delivered work
description: Use a same-model sub-agent review to compare spec claims with delivered behavior, evidence level, CSV state, validation evidence, and review log.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN all non-review issues before this row are closed THEN run same-model sub-agent review against spec-specific claim and evidence checks; WHEN gaps or overstated claims are found THEN append follow-up issues and REVIEW-02; WHEN no gaps remain THEN close the CSV.
review_initial_requirements: Verify all prior non-review rows are closed before running this review.
review_regression_requirements: Run same-model sub-agent review against the spec goals and these checks: (1) the kill test was executed verbatim and its verdict honored; (2) all thresholds were pre-registered before data; (3) no claim exceeds the artifacts; (4) competitor deltas from RESEARCH-01 still hold at writing time.
